case_title: GAGE, GEORGE et al VS FOLSOM AUTO SUPPLY, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,676.58 FILED BY GAGE, GEORGE GAGE AUTOMOTIVE AS TO DEFENDANT FOLSOM AUTO SUPPLY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
INVALID POS AS TO FOLSOM AUTO SUPPLY, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAGE, GEORGE GAGE AUTOMOTIVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOLSOM AUTO SUPPLY, INC. $1,676.58 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,691.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FOLSOM AUTO SUPPLY, INC.
